rules.name: Protect Main Branch
rules.description: Critical protection rules for the main branch

pull_request.description: Require pull request reviews before merging

status_checks.description: Require status checks to pass before merging

require_updated_branch.description: Require branches to be up to date before merging

resolved_conversations.description: Require all conversations to be resolved before merging

commit_signatures.description: Require commits to be signed (optional, set to true for enhanced security)

linear_history.description: Require linear history (optional, set to true if desired)

force_push.description: Prevent force pushes to main branch

rules.name: PR Merge Restrictions
rules.description: Control who can merge pull requests

description: Reusable ruleset configuration for protecting main branch and controlling PR merges

configuration_notes.usage: This file can be applied to multiple repositories for consistent governance
configuration_notes.how_to_apply: Use GitHub CLI or GitHub API to apply these rules to your repositories

codeowners.description: Create a CODEOWNERS file to specify who must review changes to specific files

require_signed_commits.description: Consider enabling for enhanced security - requires developers to sign commits with GPG

require_conversation_resolution.description: All conversations must be resolved before merge

require_fresh_reviews.description: Dismiss approving reviews when new commits are pushed

dependabot_security.description: Enable Dependabot for automated dependency updates and security alerts

implementation_guide.step_2: Create .github/CODEOWNERS file to specify code owners
implementation_guide.step_3: Apply rules via GitHub CLI: gh repo rules create --ruleset-name 'Main Branch Protection'
implementation_guide.step_4: Configure branch protection rules in GitHub Settings > Branches
implementation_guide.step_5: Test with a test branch to ensure rules work as expected
implementation_guide.github_cli_example: gh repo rules create --ruleset-name 'Main Protection' --enforcement active --target branch --include 'main' --deletion-allowed false
